languages.text: {n}Меровцы кивают друг другу, слышатся одобрительные выкрики, но капитан-интендант бросает на вас обеспокоенный взгляд.{/n}
{n}The Merovians exchange nods and cheers, but the captain-quartermaster casts a wary glance at you.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Меровцы кивают друг другу, слышатся одобрительные выкрики, но капитан-интендант бросает на вас обеспокоенный взгляд.{/n}

languages.text: {n}梅罗夫人互相点头致意，发出喝彩，但军需官上尉却警惕地瞥了你一眼。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians exchange nods and cheers, but the captain-quartermaster casts a wary glance at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}梅罗夫人互相点头致意，发出喝彩，但军需官上尉却警惕地瞥了你一眼。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Merovlular, başlarını sallayıp tezahürat yapıyor. Levazımcı Yüzbaşı ise sana ihtiyatlı bir bakış atıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians exchange nods and cheers, but the captain-quartermaster casts a wary glance at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Merovlular, başlarını sallayıp tezahürat yapıyor. Levazımcı Yüzbaşı ise sana ihtiyatlı bir bakış atıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les Meroviens sont en liesse, mais la capitaine-quartier-maître vous lance un regard inquiet.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians exchange nods and cheers, but the captain-quartermaster casts a wary glance at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les Meroviens sont en liesse, mais la capitaine-quartier-maître vous lance un regard inquiet.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los merovianos intercambian asentimientos y vítores, pero la capitana intendente te mira con desconfianza.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians exchange nods and cheers, but the captain-quartermaster casts a wary glance at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los merovianos intercambian asentimientos y vítores, pero la capitana intendente te mira con desconfianza.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Merovianer nicken anerkennend und jubeln, aber die Captain-Quartiermeisterin wirft dir einen erschöpften Blick zu.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians exchange nods and cheers, but the captain-quartermaster casts a wary glance at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Merovianer nicken anerkennend und jubeln, aber die Captain-Quartiermeisterin wirft dir einen erschöpften Blick zu.{/n}

languages.text: {n}メロヴの者たちはうなずき合い、歓声を上げるが、主計大尉だけは、警戒した視線をあなたに向ける。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians exchange nods and cheers, but the captain-quartermaster casts a wary glance at you.{/n}
